name: Barghest (Cuddle Time)
description:
Barghest has decided it's cuddle time and slipped you under her sweater to smother you with her massive tits. It's surprisingly cozy in there though and she doesn't plan on letting you go anytime soon.

[[Requested by the boys. I'm not too familiar with the source material so I did my best. Can't promise it'll be lore-accurate but an attempt twas made.]]
